CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_COMPLETE - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
The light of contactless should change to complete status.
CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_ERROR - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
The light of contactless should change to error status.
CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_IDLE - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
The light of contactless should change to idle status.
CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_NOT_READY - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
The light of contactless should change to not ready status.
CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_PROCESSING - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
The light of contactless should change to processing status.
CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_READY_FOR_TXN - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
The light of contactless should change to transaction ready status.
CLSS_LIGHT_STATUS_REMOVE_CARD - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
The light of contactless should inform card need removed.

Indicates if the transaction is Credential/Card on File (CoF) transaction.
CoFInitiator - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior

CompleteOnlineEMV - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
This is used to communicate with POS Service to CompleteOnlineEMV.
Only supports Full Integration app (P2PE or TermLink)

CurrentInstallment - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.MOTOECommerce

CustomData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Custom data string to be encrypted, Used to define any special formats for sensitive data (PAN, Track2, etc).
CustomEncryptedData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
An array of encrypted strings representing custom encrypted data.
CustomerCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
The reference identifier (e.g., Customer Code, Purchase Order Number, Cardholder Reference Number etc.) supplied by the commercial card cardholder.
CustomerData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCard
Deprecated.
Generic fleet customer data.
CustomerData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardRequest
Generic fleet customer data.
CustomerData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardResponse
Generic fleet customer data.
CustomerTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo
The customer tax ID.
CustomerTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail
When Tax Type is 00 Unknown or 01 - Federal/National Sales Tax , this field is customer’s federal tax ID.
When Tax Type is 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT), this field is customer’s VAT registration number.
CustomerTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.TaxDetail
When Tax Type is 00 Unknown or 01 - Federal/National Sales Tax , this field is customer’s federal tax ID.
When Tax Type is 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT), this field is customer’s VAT registration number.
CustomFormRequest - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
The CustomFormRequest for Customize Form Management.
CustomFormResponse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
The response for customize form management.
CustomizeData1 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
The customized data can be used to generate customized billing or reports etc … for the merchant.
CustomizeData2 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
The customized data can be used to generate customized billing or reports etc … for the merchant.
CustomizeData3 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
The customized data can be used to generate customized billing or reports etc … for the merchant.

CVVBypassReason - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
The reason the CVV or Gift Card PIN was not provided.
CVVCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
The CVV code, if the switch in terminal turns on, this field can exist or NULL, else it must be NULL.
CVVErrorCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AddlRspData

CVVPrompt - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Whether CVV need to be prompted during manual entry, Default as 0;
